title: YCAE36RC Cooling Capacity
summary: YCAE36RC module has a rated cooling capacity of 36.1 kW.

title: YCAE61RC Cooling Capacity
summary: YCAE61RC module has a rated cooling capacity of 60 kW.

title: YCAE36RC Heating Capacity
summary: YCAE36RC module has a rated heating capacity of 40.5 kW.

title: YCAE61RC Heating Capacity
summary: YCAE61RC module has a rated heating capacity of 65.7 kW.

title: YCAE36RC Compressor Quantity
summary: YCAE36RC module contains 3 scroll compressors.

title: YCAE61RC Compressor Quantity
summary: YCAE61RC module contains 2 scroll compressors.

title: YCAE36RC Capacity Control Steps
summary: YCAE36RC has 3 capacity control steps: 33%, 66%, 100%.

title: YCAE61RC Capacity Control Steps
summary: YCAE61RC has 2 capacity control steps: 50%, 100%.

title: YCAE36RC Evaporator Water Pressure Drop
summary: YCAE36RC evaporator water pressure drop is 17 kPa.

title: YCAE61RC Evaporator Water Pressure Drop
summary: YCAE61RC evaporator water pressure drop is 35 kPa.

title: YCAE36RC Water Connection Size
summary: YCAE36RC water connection size is 114 mm (clamp connection).

title: YCAE61RC Water Connection Size
summary: YCAE61RC water connection size is 114 mm (clamp connection).

title: YCAE36RC Dimensions
summary: YCAE36RC dimensions: length 1600 mm, width 1000 mm, height 1900 mm.

title: YCAE61RC Dimensions
summary: YCAE61RC dimensions: length 2000 mm, width 1000 mm, height 1900 mm.

title: YCAE36RC Transport Weight
summary: YCAE36RC transport weight is 700 kg.

title: YCAE61RC Transport Weight
summary: YCAE61RC transport weight is 900 kg.

title: YCAE36RC Operating Weight
summary: YCAE36RC operating weight is 750 kg.

title: YCAE61RC Operating Weight
summary: YCAE61RC operating weight is 980 kg.

title: Supply Voltage Range
summary: Standard supply voltage is 380V AC-3N-50Hz; minimum allowable 342V, maximum 418V.

title: Cooling Mode Ambient Temperature Range
summary: Cooling mode ambient temperature range: 15~46°C.

title: Heating Mode Ambient Temperature Range
summary: Heating mode ambient temperature range: -10°C~21°C.
